subject: Accounting
title: Data Analytics Catches Cheaters
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Data Analytics Catches Cheaters.

hook.text: Modern fraud detection doesn't rely on gut feeling. It relies on algorithms scanning millions of entries.

buildup.text: Auditors now use data analytics to test entire populations of transactions, not just samples.

discovery.text: Unusual patterns—duplicate invoices, round-number payments, weekend transactions—get flagged instantly.

twist.text: AI can detect fraud faster than humans, but it still needs human judgment to investigate the flags.

climax.text: The combination of human expertise and machine speed is the future of fraud detection.

punchline.text: Algorithms spot the needle. Humans check the haystack.

quiz.question: How does data analytics improve fraud detection?
options: By scanning all transactions for unusual patterns
By reducing the number of transactions
